recommendations.title: Monster Family
recommendations.overview: The Wishbone family are far from happy. In an attempt to reconnect as a family, they plan a fun night out. However, the plan backfires when they are cursed and all turned into Monsters.

recommendations.title: Air Bud: Spikes Back
recommendations.overview: Air Bud finds that he has the uncanny ability to play volleyball.

recommendations.title: The BFG
recommendations.overview: An orphan little girl befriends a benevolent giant who takes her to Giant Country, where they attempt to stop the man-eating giants that are invading the human world.

recommendations.title: Doogal
recommendations.overview: An adorable candy-loving mutt goes on a mission to save the world.
recommendations.director: Jean Duval, Dave Borthwick, Frank Passingham

recommendations.title: The Godfather
recommendations.overview: Spanning the years 1945 to 1955, a chronicle of the fictional Italian-American Corleone crime family. When organized crime family patriarch, Vito Corleone barely survives an attempt on his life, his youngest son, Michael steps in to take care of the

recommendations.title: Eulogy
recommendations.overview: A black comedy that follows three generations of a family, who come together for the funeral of the patriarch - unveiling a litany of family secrets and covert relationships.

recommendations.title: Imagine That
recommendations.overview: A financial executive who can't stop his career downspiral is invited into his daughter's imaginary world, where solutions to his problems await.

recommendations.title: Be Sick… It's Free
recommendations.overview: Comedy about the flawed Italian healthcare system of the time and a doctor's expeirence with it.

recommendations.title: The Shamer's Daughter

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.
